Meet Pasq Trades

My name is Roman Pasquarelli, but most people know me as “Pasq Trades.”

I started trading at 16. I wasn’t born into anything crazy—I lived a normal life. I played soccer, stayed active, had a supportive family… but I always felt like I wanted more.

What started as curiosity turned into something I took seriously. I spent countless hours learning, testing, winning, losing, and figuring out what actually works. It wasn’t fast, and it definitely wasn’t easy—but I stayed consistent.

Now at 18, everything I’ve built has come from trading. Over time, I’ve been able to generate strong results and build real consistency month to month.

I’ve had months where I’ve done really well—but what matters more to me is consistency, not one big win.

From that, I’ve been able to fund things like my fully built BMW M340i—which to me represents discipline, patience, and execution.

I’m not here to sell a dream or act like a guru. I’m here to teach what actually works.

No fluff. No unrealistic promises. Just a structured approach you can actually apply.

If you’re ready to take trading seriously, this is where you start.
